entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,549Chapters: 28/28Kudos: 165

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
  • Rape/Non-Con

entry.title: OnlyBuck
entry.summary:
Author: Spacers24

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,201Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 283

Summary: (previously named CamBuck) When Buck finds himself low on fund after the lawsuit, his brilliant Idea to get more money is to open an onlyfans, keeping his identity a secret. Eddie stumbles upon his Onlyfans one night and discover Buck real identity next morning. Thus start Eddie Diaz quest to try and control himself around Buck, while the rest of the 118 is dragged along for the ride.

entry.title: If You Forget I Will Remember
entry.summary:
Author: Nobody_Owens

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,718Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 732

Summary: After a rough day at the station post-lawsuit, Buck decides to fall back into his 1.0 habits. Lost in his thoughts Buck doesn't notice things taking a dangerous turn until it's too late. When the 118 arrive on scene to discover Buck holding on by a thread. will they be able to save him in time? Or will they lose him forever?*Contains use of Roofies and implied SA. NO REAL SA scenes but just be warned.*

entry.title: Some Fairy Tale Bliss
entry.summary:
Author: ThoseTwoFirefighters (Nobody_Owens)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,554Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 464

Summary: Buck's life has been full of changes over the last year, from the bombing to the embolism to the tsunami. None of those things were as devastating as the words Eddie shouted at him in the middle of a busy supermarket. Hurt and alone Buck heads to a bar, where a one-night stand with a charming stranger turns his life upside down once again, in a way he never could have imagined.When hard decisions are made and truths and feelings come to light, will Buck and his newborn daughter find their happily ever after?Beta Reader: @malectarlosIn Memory of @malectarlos

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,529Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 118

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday & Tuesday nights AEST]

entry.title: Between Two Lungs
entry.summary:
Author: noLongerhumannn

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,291Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 240

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley is 35 years old when he decides to settle down in Los Angeles for a job offer.Eddie Diaz is 27 years old when he agrees to help Maddie Buckley's 'little' brother move into his new home.Eddie discovers what it means to love someone the second his breath gets caught on Buck's blue eyes.

entry.title: The ultimate mother son team up
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,608Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 178

Summary: “Being a realtor doesn’t give you the legal right to fly over her property.” Buck piped up as he reached the small group, earning a slightly surprised look from the man. “You may have been given permission by the owners of the home that you’re trying to film but you didn’t get this ladies permission which means you were still breaking the law.” “Thank you Buck-“ Athena shot him an amused look and Buck shot her a grin back. “Just coming over to check on you.” “And to make up for missing family dinner hm?” “You know it mama.” ... A call involving a drone comes in and Buck and Athena don't like the man behind the drone.

entry.title: A life for a life
entry.summary:
Author: Abyss_Theory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,878Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Ravi knows the government-military are lying, their not always right thats for sure. he knows they're hiding something, that theres more than meets the eye. so he con finds in Athena-the wife of his late boss. together they would uncover the truth. but their not the only ones on a difficult journey.   or; the author might have written this just for an excuse to make Ravi and Athena interact. entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,974Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 507

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Pink Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,934Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 60

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: call me friend but keep me closer (call you when the party’s over)
entry.summary:
Author: loversalwayslose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,494Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: “I promise you, that won’t happen,” Eddie assured him.“But it is,” Buck sobbed. “It is. You’re going to find a- a woman who you’ll fall in love with, and then you and Chris are gonna move on and won’t need me anymore, and I- I’ll just be Buck again.”“You’ll never be ‘just Buck’,” Eddie said, still holding Buck’s face in his hands. “You’ll never be ‘just’ anything to us, and we’re not going to move on from you.”“You can’t promise that,” Buck sniffled.“But I can,” Eddie told him, taking a deep breath as he wiped away Buck’s tears with his thumbs. “I can.”“How?” Buck’s voice crackled.Eddie looked at him for a moment before his voice dropped low. “Because I’ve already found all of that with you.” or the "he just didn't want to marry me" fic title from when the party's over by billie eilish

entry.title: The Other Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: villayuly1987

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,619Chapters: 33/40Kudos: 220

Summary: When the Buckleys decide their daughter belongs in an institution, Evan Buckley makes a choice. He chooses his sister. Andrea Buckley has cerebral palsy. She uses a wheelchair, sometimes a walker. She laughs loud, talks fast, and refuses to be reduced to a diagnosis. She is Evan’s whole heart. The night their parents try to send her away, Evan packs her bags, takes the keys, and drives toward Los Angeles with no plan and no backup. He becomes her brother, her guardian, her steady ground. Years later at the 118, his instincts with adaptive care and kids finally make sense to everyone else. Slow burn. Found family. And maybe something more with Eddie Diaz.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: i'm a sucker for blue eyes (yours, dumbass)
entry.summary:
Author: SeaOfBread

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,461Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 87

Summary: “Come on, it’s Ryan Gosling, Eddie! Isn’t he everyone’s celebrity crush? Even you have to admit that he’s just an objectively beautiful man.” Eddie chuckles, and Buck doesn’t miss the sudden rosiness to his cheeks as he ducks his head to finally zip up his med kit. “Hey, I’m definitely not disagreeing with you.” Buck expected some variation of this answer, but the inflection in Eddie’s voice startles him briefly. “You’re not?” “Nope,” Eddie replies easily, popping the P as he stands, slinging his bag over his shoulder. “I completely agree with you. I’m a sucker for blue eyes.” He then has the audacity to walk away, leaving Buck short-circuiting in his wake. There is no way he just… “Eddie, wait!” Buck starts to jog after him. “What do you—” Boom. Boom. Boom. Boom. Buck then watches in horror as the ground opens up, taking his entire world with it. Or: A s09e17 speculation where a bridge explosion leads to an Eddie NDE, and Buck goes a little crazy. Ft. Buck&Harry brotherism, Buck&Chris, and a deep dive into Eddie's recklessness this season.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: one day i am gonna grow wings
entry.summary:
Author: romitriism

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,754Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: Buck was tired. Exhausted, really. Ever since Bobby's death, he's been slowly declining and after New Mexico... Well, he's reached a whole new low. Or Buck tries to kill himself and Eddie's the one that finds him.

entry.title: You Are the A**hole (and Other Things Eddie Diaz Learned from the Internet)
entry.summary:
Author: TrustyRobot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,894Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 130

Summary: It started, as most disasters in Eddie Diaz's life did, with Christopher."Dad, you need to download Reddit."Eddie looked up from his coffee. His son was regarding him with the particular expression he'd inherited entirely from Eddie's mother — the one that said I love you but you are an embarrassment to this family."I have enough apps.""You have the weather app, the calculator, and like six games that came with the phone.""And ESPN.""Dad.""I don't need Reddit. I know what Reddit is." He did not, in any meaningful way, know what Reddit was. He had a vague impression of memes and arguments. He got enough of both at the 118.Christopher sighed in the way that only thirteen-year-olds could — with their entire body, their entire soul, their entire generational disappointment. "There are communities for literally everything. There's one for vintage cars, there's one for—""Fine."That was how it happened. Eddie downloaded Reddit for the vintage Chevelle restoration forum and spent approximately forty-five minutes there before he clicked on something called r/AITAH and fell directly into a hole he would not climb out of for weeks.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Numb
entry.summary:
Author: milowren

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,717Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 192

Summary: Evan Buckley is five years old when he realizes that he doesn’t feel pain. Evan is five and a half when he learns how to pretend. Over the years, Buck gets really, really good at pretending. That is, until the day Eddie gets shot right in front of him.***An AU where Buck is unable to feel pain.
